title: Remove deprecated RX_POLL from protocol and servers
description: Delete polling code after ALL callers converted: (1) sim_client.py uses MSG_RX_OK/decode_rx_ok, (2) node_server.py uses MSG_RX/encode_rx_ok. Cannot remove from protocol.py until these are converted. Premature removal reverted.
acceptance_criteria: No RX_POLL references remain; 2-node test still passes with push-based RX
close_reason: Removed deprecated RX_POLL code from protocol.py, node_server.py, and updated tests; protocol and node_server tests pass; 2-node sim tests use push-based RX
